name: @pcircle/footprint
description: Local-first MCP server for AI work history, context memory, and encrypted evidence
author: PCIRCLE, LLC

scripts.build:ui: mkdir -p dist/ui && pnpm build:ui:dashboard && pnpm build:ui:detail && pnpm build:ui:export && pnpm build:ui:session-dashboard && pnpm build:ui:session-detail && pnpm build:ui:session-dashboard-live && pnpm build:ui:session-detail-live
scripts.build:ui:dashboard: cross-env INPUT=ui/dashboard.html vite build --outDir dist/ui-tmp && cp dist/ui-tmp/ui/dashboard.html dist/ui/dashboard.html
scripts.build:ui:detail: cross-env INPUT=ui/detail.html vite build --outDir dist/ui-tmp && cp dist/ui-tmp/ui/detail.html dist/ui/detail.html
scripts.build:ui:export: cross-env INPUT=ui/export.html vite build --outDir dist/ui-tmp && cp dist/ui-tmp/ui/export.html dist/ui/export.html
scripts.build:ui:session-dashboard: cross-env INPUT=ui/session-dashboard.html vite build --outDir dist/ui-tmp && cp dist/ui-tmp/ui/session-dashboard.html dist/ui/session-dashboard.html
scripts.build:ui:session-detail: cross-env INPUT=ui/session-detail.html vite build --outDir dist/ui-tmp && cp dist/ui-tmp/ui/session-detail.html dist/ui/session-detail.html
scripts.build:ui:session-dashboard-live: cross-env INPUT=ui/session-dashboard-live.html vite build --outDir dist/ui-tmp && cp dist/ui-tmp/ui/session-dashboard-live.html dist/ui/session-dashboard-live.html
scripts.build:ui:session-detail-live: cross-env INPUT=ui/session-detail-live.html vite build --outDir dist/ui-tmp && cp dist/ui-tmp/ui/session-detail-live.html dist/ui/session-detail-live.html
scripts.test:publish-gate: pnpm audit --audit-level=moderate && pnpm build && pnpm test:run && pnpm test:pack-smoke
